executive_summary: This week marks a major onboarding push: MedStation and Maadi Law both launched with full CRM builds underway, both blocked on compliance gates (BAA and A2P/DNS). Full Smile's CRM handoff is live with 7 open bugs and integration tasks. Liferun has 5 critical automation gaps flagged at handoff—Becklar deactivation and return automation are the highest-risk. Billy Doe's subscription box video ads remain stalled 33 days. Quality HVAC (Fibid) handed off with 7 open CRM tasks and a booking bot test scoped for month-end.

departments_overview.summary: Heaviest load of the year: 3 new client handoffs (MedStation 10 tasks, Maadi 8 tasks, Fibid 7 tasks) plus Full Smile's 7 open items and Liferun's 5 critical gaps. MedStation and Maadi both blocked on compliance; Liferun's deactivation and return automations are unbuilt and high-risk.
Routine updates across most clients. No new critical blockers, but Billy Doe's July 4th creatives item last touched June 29 and Website Problem stalled since June 19.

Billy Doe Sub Box ads stalled 33 days (last touch June 10). Full Smile's 7 ads stalled 20 days. Quality HVAC's two video items from May still sit in For Review. Maadi Law's 10 clips received scope July 6 but no update since.
Steel Round Bars website subitems marked Stuck since April. Healing Helps email deliverability in progress since May 28. Most other clients steady or waiting on CRM/Ads dependencies.
